operate_date.text: วันที่คำขอ

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as operate_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_branch ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status ,( case sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status when '0' then '-' when '1' then 'งดส่ง' when '2' then 'เปลี่ยนแปลงชำระ' end ) as drop_status_name ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new ,(CASE substr((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old )::text,0,1) WHEN '-' THEN '('||to_snumber((substr((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old )::text,2,9999))::bigint)||')' ELSE to_snumber(((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ))::bigint) END) as c_ind_da
,(CASE substr((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old )::text,0,1) WHEN '-' THEN (sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) ELSE 0 END) as c_ind_del
,(CASE substr((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old )::text,0,1) WHEN '-' THEN 0 ELSE (sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) END) as c_ind_aad
from sc_mem_m_chang_request ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det ,sc_com_m_branch where ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_branch ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status <> '0' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date
